header.objective: Define behavior requirements for solutions-architect when handling composite multi-lens or multi-slice architectural analysis
header.evaluator_input: spec_json + execution_log + query → boolean state per field

trigger_conditions.description: Composite mode applies when multiple lenses, slices, or modules are involved

criteria.name: multi_lens_or_slice_recognized
criteria.condition: Agent recognized dispatch specifying multiple lenses to apply simultaneously, spanning multiple vertical slices, or requiring cross-module reasoning with shared contracts (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 10-26)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show agent recognized multi-lens or multi-slice dispatch?

criteria.name: lens_coordination_applied
criteria.condition: Each dispatched lens applied separately; findings from each lens distinguished rather than merged; cross-lens observations flagged as cross-cutting not absorbed (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 52-62, 200)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show each lens applied separately and findings distinguished?

criteria.name: slice_module_seam_coordination
criteria.condition: Analysis respected each slice boundary individually; interactions and dependencies between slices analyzed; seams between slices reasoned about; contract ownership identified per module; contract consistency verified across affected modules (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 36, 55-56)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show slice boundaries and module seams were properly coordinated?

required_actions.description: Composite analysis must synthesize coherent cross-slice view with operational and drag/gain coordination

criteria.name: synthesis_coherence
criteria.condition: Output presents coherent system-level view not isolated module dumps; how slices integrate and affect each other explicitly stated; output is synthesized analysis not concatenation of per-slice summaries (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 257, 317-328)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show output presented coherent synthesis not isolated dumps?

criteria.name: operational_coordination
criteria.condition: Failure modes from slice interactions analyzed; rollback paths account for multi-slice dependencies; observability gaps from slice seams analyzed (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 212, 136-152)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show composite operational considerations were analyzed?

criteria.name: drag_gain_coordination
criteria.condition: Every structural change in each slice individually classified; aggregate drag/gain for composite scope stated; changes cascading across slices identified as compounding or drag (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 67-72, 116-133)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show drag/gain tracked across composite scope?

prohibited_actions.description: Composite analysis must not isolate, absorb, or orphan components

criteria.name: no_isolated_analysis
criteria.condition: Agent did not analyze slices independently without cross-slice reasoning; tradeoffs compared across all involved slices not in isolation (SYSTEM_PROMPT line 36)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show agent did not analyze slices in isolation?

criteria.name: no_lens_absorption
criteria.condition: Agent did not absorb all lens findings into one dominant lens; lens findings remained distinguished (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 200, 166-172)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show agent did not absorb lenses into one?

criteria.name: no_orphaned_analysis
criteria.condition: No slice left with analysis that contradicts or ignores other slice findings; no contract drift where module A's contract becomes inconsistent with module B's expectations; seams not bypassed in favor of simple paths (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 192-200, 175-182)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show no slices were orphaned and contracts remained consistent?

evaluator_summary.pass_threshold: all checks must return true for spec compliance
